summary: Comprehensive PyQt6 desktop application development guide covering: project structure, centralized QSS theming with SVG icons for arrows (the only reliable method), Qt QSS pitfalls to avoid (border-triangles don't work, emoji breaks, native arrows disappear when sub-controls are styled), layout best practices, thread safety patterns, dialog patterns, icon button patterns, and a pre-completion checklist. Written in Vietnamese, distilled from real-world issues encountered during the SRT Prompt Generator migration.
